sglang.title: add `.isort.cfg`
sglang.author: hnyls2002
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
This is due to isort does not recognize sglang as a first-party module, adding a .isort.cfg to fix it.
This PR does:

Reformatted all files under /python and /test to follow the new config.
Safely removed some unused imports/variables.

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Ensure download_weights_from_hf(..) inside loader is using the revision parameter
vllm.author: alexm-redhat
vllm.bodyExcerpt: The revision was not passed to the download_weights_from_hf(..) function in the loader.py, which was causing mismatch issues when loading models with a specific revision.

vllm.title: Add example scripts to documentation
vllm.author: hmellor
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Closes #3547
Notes:

Currently only works for scripts at the top level of examples
Nested/multi file examples (fp8, production_monitoring) are not included
If the examples were to be rewritten as notebooks we could use nbsphinx to elegantly render proper tutorial style examples as webpages

vllm.title: [Core] Scheduler perf fix
vllm.author: rkooo567
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
After the scheduler refactoring PR, the scheduler iteration overhead became 2ms -> 11ms.
The major overhead was coming from logger.debug added to schedule_running. The main issue I think was that fstring is always evaluated although logger.debug is used, which causes additional overhead. Adding a ve

vllm.title: [Core][Distributed] use absolute path for library file
vllm.author: youkaichao
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
#4155 adds integrity check for nccl library by ldd, which causes problem for rocm: ldd requires full path of library. Therefore, we need to find full path of the library.
Should fix #4257 .

vllm.title: Fix `autodoc` directives
vllm.author: hmellor
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Documentation updates:

Update SamplingParams to use autoclass instead of automodule so that the SamplingParams class is properly documented.
Add :members: option to SamplingParams so it is fully documented.
Remove specific :members: from AsyncLLMEngine and LLMEngine because they weren't being kept

vllm.author: rkooo567

The remaining one has a lot of changes required for each of them.
Also move --follow-imports to the pyproject.toml
